title: Present Perfect
cefrCanDo: Can describe experiences using present perfect

explanation.rule_id: Present Perfect digunakan untuk aksi yang terjadi di masa lalu namun waktunya tidak ditentukan, atau masih berhubungan dengan sekarang. Polanya: have/has + verb 3.
explanation.rule_en: Use Present Perfect for actions at an unspecific time in the past or connected to the present. Pattern: have/has + past participle (verb 3).
examples: I have seen that movie before.
She has lived in Paris for three years.
exceptions: Jangan gunakan Present Perfect dengan penanda waktu spesifik seperti 'yesterday'.
explanation.tip_id: Gunakan 'ever' untuk bertanya pengalaman, dan 'never' untuk yang belum pernah dilakukan.

exercises.prompt: I ___ to that restaurant many times.
exercises.explanation_id: Jawaban benar: 'have been'. Ini adalah pengalaman hidup, gunakan Present Perfect. 'I' berpasangan dengan 'have'.

title: Conditionals Type 1
cefrCanDo: Can talk about possible future events

explanation.rule_id: Conditional Type 1 digunakan untuk kemungkinan nyata di masa depan. Polanya: If + Present Simple, will + verb 1.
explanation.rule_en: Use Conditional Type 1 for real possibilities in the future. Pattern: If + Present Simple, will + verb 1.
examples: If it rains, I will stay at home.
If you study hard, you will pass the exam.
We will be late if we don't hurry.
explanation.tip_id: Koma (,) hanya digunakan jika kalimat dimulai dengan 'If'.

exercises.prompt: If she ___ early, she will catch the bus.
exercises.explanation_id: Jawaban benar: 'leaves'. Setelah 'If', gunakan Present Simple.
